repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
shelfmark_ssi: UTO Sinai Arabic NF M 8, SPP No. 359
contents_tesim: This may be part of a Latin Apocalypse which K. Weitzmann (who may have seen it whilst photographing the contents of Chest 2 in the monastery of St Catherine's) informed B. Bischoff of, but which Bischoff does not appear to have seen. Alternatively, this may be a second Latin Apocalypse from Sinai
full_text_tesim: Good quality script of the sort practised in Rome (Brown)
Identification of script by Michelle Brown and Daniela Mairhofer

This may be part of a Latin Apocalypse which K. Weitzmann (who may have seen it whilst photographing the contents of Chest 2 in the monastery of St Catherine's) informed B. Bischoff of, but which Bischoff does not appear to have seen. Alternatively, this may be a second Latin Apocalypse from Sinai
UTO Sinai Arabic NF M 8, SPP No. 359
